Added_Other.purpose: Minimizes interruptions for players, allowing for a more immersive experience.

Added_Other.name: FFlagAddSnoozeSupportForSquadNudgeToasts_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Enables a feature to temporarily dismiss notifications for squad nudges.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows players to snooze squad notifications, reducing interruptions during gameplay.

Added_Other.name: FFlagAudioEmitterListenerCframeCaching
Added_Other.mechanism: Caches the position data of audio emitters for better performance.
Added_Other.purpose: Reduces lag and improves audio playback in games.

Added_Other.name: FFlagEnableConsoleAutoFocusForUEN1
Added_Other.mechanism: Automatically focuses input fields on consoles for user engagement.
Added_Other.purpose: Streamlines the user interface for console players, making it easier to interact.

Added_Other.name: FFlagEnablePreviewLimitingTPGen
Added_Other.mechanism: Limits the generation of previews based on specific criteria.
Added_Other.purpose: Optimizes the preview experience, making it faster and more relevant for players.

Added_Other.name: FFlagFixFormatIssueOnContentAssetIds
Added_Other.mechanism: Corrects formatting errors in asset identification numbers.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures players can access and use assets without issues related to identification.

Added_Other.name: FFlagFmodLockFreeDspActive
Added_Other.mechanism: Activates a lock-free audio processing system.
Added_Other.purpose: Reduces audio lag and improves sound performance during gameplay.

Added_Other.name: FFlagMigrateTPGenRSL
Added_Other.mechanism: Migrates the teleportation generation system to a new framework.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances teleportation features, making them more reliable and efficient for players.

Added_Other.mechanism: Introduces a new configuration for managing notification groups.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows players to receive more organized and relevant notifications.

Added_Graphics.mechanism: Improves how the game engine determines which objects are visible to the player, reducing unnecessary rendering.
Added_Graphics.purpose: Enhances game performance by making it smoother and faster, especially in complex scenes.
